prompt_used: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You identify the culprit but lose the witness chain and public confidence." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
